_comment: GotA FILL-terrain layer (PRODUCTION). Per-hex CCRR -> terrain for materials/map/Americas_all.jpg. 6 types: water/clear/desert/rough by base COLOR (desert+rough = clear-but-darker shades); woods/swamp by symbol MORPHOLOGY (woods=green tree-marks; swamp=horizontal broken blue-gray dashes on a cream base, supervised from an operator screenshot of 12 confirmed FL hexes). Sample hex CENTER r<=60px + mask the printed number; symbol terrains override base color. Digitized + operator-confirmed 2026-06-30 (guns-013 v4 hybrid). Grid: data/hexgrid.json. FILL ONLY -- hexside (rivers/rail/MOUNTAINS) + points (cities/objectives/ports) are separate layers, not yet digitized.
